mapper.select:
SELECT F.LOTNO, ISNULL(F.FAILGUBUN, '') AS FAILGUBUN, F.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, ISNULL(F.FAILQTY, 0) AS FAILQTY, F.FAILTYPE, F.FAILBREAKDOWN, 0 AS CONVERT_QTY, ISNULL(F.REMARK, '') AS REMARK, '' AS IN_WAREHOUSE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), F.REGDTM, 120) AS REGDATE, '' AS CUSTOMPARTNO, F.WORKORDNO, F.LINECD FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY F LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON F.PARTNO = G.PARTNO
1=1 AND F.REGDTM >= #{start_date} AND F.REGDTM <= #{end_date} + ' 23:59:59' AND F.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND F.LOTNO LIKE #{lot_no}
AND F.FAILGUBUN IN (${fail_gubun_list})
ORDER BY F.REGDTM DESC, F.LOTNO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_FAILQTY_HISTORY (LOTNO, FAILTYPE, FAILBREAKDOWN, WORKORDNO, PLANTCD, LINECD, PROCESSCD, SHIFT, PARTNO, FAILQTY, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, REMARK, FAILGUBUN) SELECT LOTNO, FAILTYPE, FAILBREAKDOWN, WORKORDNO, PLANTCD, LINECD, PROCESSCD, SHIFT, PARTNO, FAILQTY, REGUSERID, REGDTM, 1, GETDATE(), #{REMARK}, FAILGUBUN FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY WHERE LOTNO = #{LOTNO} AND FAILTYPE = #{FAILTYPE} AND FAILBREAKDOWN = #{FAILBREAKDOWN}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY WHERE LOTNO = #{LOTNO} AND FAILTYPE = #{FAILTYPE} AND FAILBREAKDOWN = #{FAILBREAKDOWN}
